title: Everything You Need to Know About Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, or if you've been blocked by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you know how hard it is to sell your ebooks, courses, or digital products online. You've tried to find ways around the restrictions, but most solutions require KYC, subscriptions, or high fees. That's why Unchained Commerce has created tools to help you sell digital products without these limitations, using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and more. In this post, we'll break down everything you need to know about crypto payment gateways for digital products, so you can start taking action and getting paid for your work.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A crypto payment gateway for digital products is a system that allows buyers to pay for digital goods like ebooks, courses, and software using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and others. This is different from traditional payment gateways like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, which often require KYC, have high fees, or block transactions from certain countries. By using a crypto payment gateway, you can sell your digital products globally, without worrying about these restrictions.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind a crypto payment gateway involves a combination of frontend and backend components, including wallet integration, payment processing, and automated delivery. The frontend wallet integration, like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), provides a user-friendly interface for buyers to select their preferred cryptocurrency and generate a multi-chain QR code for payment. The backend engine, like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), handles payment verification, automated delivery, and transaction logging.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is built for digital creators like you, who want to sell their ebooks, courses, or software online without the hassle of KYC, subscriptions, or high fees. It's also suitable for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores, who need a reliable and scalable solution for their customers. With Unchained Commerce's tools, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while we handle the payment processing and delivery.
Crypto payment gateways are the future of digital product sales, and Unchained Commerce is leading the way.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make a crypto payment gateway work together include the frontend wallet integration, like Web3 Wallet Connect, which provides a user-friendly interface for buyers to select their preferred cryptocurrency and generate a multi-chain QR code for payment. The backend engine, like the Core Shop Engine, handles payment verification, automated delivery, and transaction logging. Additionally, the Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides real-time analytics and order management, making it easy to track your sales and customer activity.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling your digital products using a crypto payment gateway, follow these steps: set up a store on Unchained Commerce's platform (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html), integrate Web3 Wallet Connect for frontend wallet integration, configure your payment settings, and start promoting your digital products to your audience. By following these steps, you can start taking action and getting paid for your work, without the limitations of traditional payment gateways.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Don't let PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip hold you back from selling your ebooks, courses, or software online.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're also interested in selling digital downloads, such as Notion templates for Bitcoin, or want to find a platform to sell digital products without fees, Unchained Commerce has the tools you need. Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products using a crypto payment gateway, follow these steps: set up a store on Unchained Commerce's platform (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html), integrate Web3 Wallet Connect for frontend wallet integration, configure your payment settings, and start promoting your digital products to your audience. Don't forget to use our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) for real-time analytics and order management, making it easy to track your sales and customer activity.
Start selling your digital products today and take advantage of the benefits of crypto payment gateways, such as no KYC, no subscriptions, and no high fees.
